channel.title: Text-Generation on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Text-Generation on Arrans github.io

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

item.title: henk717/KoboldAI
item.description: KoboldAI is generative AI software optimized for fictional use, but capable of much more!
